title: uproperties.ini
text: uproperties.ini The uproperties.ini file defines the syntax of properties as well as property groups for web widgets. Note: The uproperties.ini file is a user-editable file. You can clone and create your own uproperties.ini file as per your need. Default location Depends on the value specified by the /adm switch. The web.ini file is located in /uniface/adm in your Uniface installation folder. File Sections [PropertyDefinition] [PropertyDataTypes] [PropertyGroups] Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
